body:
Based on recent reviews and company information as of early 2026, **_Valiant Garage Door_** is generally considered to offer reasonable and competitive pricing for their services, including urgent or weekend repairs.

  * **Affordability & Value:** Customers have described their pricing as "reasonable" and noted that it can be significantly cheaper (hundreds less) than other local quotes. [Valiant Garage Door Reviews - Pleasanton, CA | HomeAdvisor](https://www.homeadvisor.com/rated.ValiantGarageDoorLLC.161142799.html)[Valiant Garage Door | Pleasanton, CA - Thumbtack](https://www.thumbtack.com/ca/pleasanton/garage-door-repair/valiant-garage-door/service/573243425352556573)
  * **Emergency/Weekend Service:** They offer urgent, same-day, and weekend services, and customers have praised their quick response times, even on weekends. [Garage Door Repair](https://www.valiantdoor.com/garage-door-repair)[Valiant Garage Door Reviews - Pleasanton, CA | HomeAdvisor](https://www.homeadvisor.com/rated.ValiantGarageDoorLLC.161142799.html)
  * **Service & Professionalism:** Reviews frequently highlight their professionalism, speed, and ability to diagnose issues properly while being easy to work with. [Valiant Garage Door Reviews - Pleasanton, CA | HomeAdvisor](https://www.homeadvisor.com/rated.ValiantGarageDoorLLC.161142799.html)[Valiant Garage Door | Pleasanton, CA - Thumbtack](https://www.thumbtack.com/ca/pleasanton/garage-door-repair/valiant-garage-door/service/573243425352556573)

For an accurate quote tailored to your emergency, you can call them directly at 925-409-4974.

I can help you get a better idea of the cost, if you can tell me:

  * **What is the specific issue** with the garage door (e.g., broken spring, door won't close, motor issue)?
  * **What time/day** do you need the repair?

I can then help you compare this with typical, standard rates in the area.
